testimonials.text: Dr. Chen's acupuncture treatments completely transformed my chronic back pain. After just a few sessions, I felt more mobility and energy than I'd had in years. Her gentle approach and genuine care made all the difference.

The herbal formulas Dr. Chen prescribed helped me manage work stress in ways I never expected. I sleep better, feel more grounded, and actually look forward to my weekly visits to this peaceful clinic.

Cupping therapy at Pacific Meridian Care relieved my shoulder tension better than months of other treatments. Dr. Chen explains everything clearly and makes me feel completely comfortable throughout each session.

Dr. Chen's comprehensive pain management approach gave me my life back after a sports injury. The combination of acupuncture and lifestyle guidance addressed issues I didn't even realize were connected.
As someone new to TCM, I was amazed by how Dr. Chen's holistic treatments improved not just my digestive issues but my overall sense of well-being. This clinic feels like a true healing sanctuary.
